# remnawave_host_tags (Data Source)

Lists all unique host tags from the Remnawave panel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_host_tags" "all" {}

output "all_host_tags" {
  value = data.remnawave_host_tags.all.tags
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `tags` (List of String) Set of all unique tags assigned to any host.
